Description: A tool facilitating matching for any dataset discovery method. Also, an extensible experiment suite for state-of-the-art schema matching methods.

Name: token-savior
Description: The MCP server that turns Claude into the only coding agent hitting 100% on a real benchmark. -77% active tokens, -76% wall time, 0 losses across 96 tasks on Claude Opus 4.7. Structural code navigation + persistent memory. Works with every MCP client.

Name: trogon
Description: Easily turn your Click CLI into a powerful terminal application

Name: robotframework
Description: Generic automation framework for acceptance testing and RPA

Name: graphify
Description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

Name: aws-sdk-pandas
Description: pandas on AWS - Easy integration with Athena, Glue, Redshift, Timestream, Neptune, OpenSearch, QuickSight, Chime, CloudWatchLogs, DynamoDB, EMR, SecretManager, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLServer and S3 (Parquet, CSV, JSON and EXCEL).
